title: types: ChatCreateDirectInput, ChatCreateGroupInput, ChatUpdateInput, TypingResponse
description:
What: Define all new input types for Chat set methods and the TypingResponse struct in methods/mod.rs.

Algorithm:
1. Add TypingResponse struct (account_id: String, #[serde(rename_all="camelCase")]) to mod.rs — used by chat_typing.
2. Add AddMemberInput<'a> struct: id: &'a str, role: Option<crate::types::ChatMemberRole>
3. Add UpdateMemberRoleInput<'a> struct: id: &'a str, role: crate::types::ChatMemberRole
4. Add ChatCreateDirectInput<'a>: client_id: &'a str, contact_id: &'a str
5. Add ChatCreateGroupInput<'a>: client_id: &'a str, name: &'a str, member_ids: &'a [&'a str], description: Option<&'a str>, avatar_blob_id: Option<&'a str>, message_expiry_seconds: Option<u64>
6. Add ChatUpdateInput<'a>: id: &'a str, muted: Option<bool>, mute_until: Option<Option<&'a crate::jmap::UTCDate>>, receive_typing_indicators: Option<bool>, pinned_message_ids: Option<&'a [&'a str]>, message_expiry_seconds: Option<u64>, receipt_sharing: Option<bool>, name: Option<&'a str>, description: Option<Option<&'a str>>, avatar_blob_id: Option<Option<&'a str>>, add_members: &'a [AddMemberInput<'a>], remove_members: &'a [&'a str], update_member_roles: &'a [UpdateMemberRoleInput<'a>]
7. All slices default to &[] when unused; Option fields are None when unused. No #[derive(Default)] — id has no safe default.

Defensive programming rules:
- Use lifetime 'a on all struct fields that borrow strings
- All slice fields use &'a [T] not Vec<T> (consistent with MessageUpdateInput pattern)
- No unwrap(), no key material, structs derive Debug only

Acceptance: cargo test passes, cargo clippy -D warnings clean, cargo fmt --check passes
acceptance_criteria: cargo test passes; cargo clippy --all-features -- -D warnings clean; cargo fmt --check passes; TypingResponse, AddMemberInput, UpdateMemberRoleInput, ChatCreateDirectInput, ChatCreateGroupInput, ChatUpdateInput all defined in mod.rs
close_reason: All 6 types added to mod.rs: TypingResponse, AddMemberInput, UpdateMemberRoleInput, ChatCreateDirectInput, ChatCreateGroupInput, ChatUpdateInput
